log.why: Tags are runtime/search metadata and are not currently sourced from canonical spell fields.

fields.comment: Tags are runtime/search metadata and are not currently sourced from canonical spell fields. It maps to `tags[]`. Purpose: tags[] exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about this mechanic. It is runtime metadata derived from file organization or local engine needs rather than a direct canonical prose mechanic. It maps to runtime JSON path `tags[]`. The value type is `string-array`. This is expected on every spell/template instance. Because this field is required, every spell should carry a deliberate value rather than relying on absence.
